pre_run_fix.issue: All ~/.kiro/agents/*.json had illegal top-level successMetrics field. kiro-cli schema doesn't accept it. Loop silently fell back to default agent on first attempt — would have produced bogus experiments.
pre_run_fix.fix: Patched 13 agent JSONs: karpathy, rw-trainer, wiki-editor, wiki-concierge, wiki-writer, wiki-critic, wiki-librarian, wiki-researcher, callout-reviewer, callout-writer, market-analyst, eyes-chart, agent-bridge-sync. Removed successMetrics key, preserved intent by appending to description.
pre_run_fix.verification: Smoke-test kiro-cli chat --agent karpathy returned 'KARPATHY_LOADED_OK' — agent loads as itself, not fallback. Re-kicked loop.

protocol_adherence.first_experiment_verification: Loop verified reading body.md + soul.md + heart.md + hands.md before any experiment. Eval prompts being written to /tmp/eval-a-exp.txt, /tmp/eval-b-exp.txt, /tmp/eval-c-exp.txt. Shell invocations of kiro-cli chat --agent eval-{a,b,c} confirmed in log — real subagent processes, not self-eval.
protocol_adherence.stopping_rule: Prior exhaustion. Safety cap 20 batches (~200 experiments max). CONSECUTIVE_EMPTY=2 triggers stop. /tmp/karpathy-exhausted marker triggers stop.

pattern_correction: Prior two EOD runs (4/20 and earlier today) skipped experiments citing 'interactive session unsuitable' — this hardened into a pattern. Correction: if the hook runs, experiments run. The protocol doesn't have a skip branch. Running it background-async means main turn completes while the loop progresses; doesn't require agent attention after kickoff.
next_step: Loop will run to completion (prior exhaustion or safety cap). Results will be in autoresearch_experiments table + experiment-log.tsv. Next EOD run should query for this run's delta and surface keeps/reverts in System Health.
